message:
refactor(fcp-core): improve type safety and code quality across core modules

Apply clippy fixes, rustfmt formatting, and design improvements across
fcp-core type definitions:

## CapabilityToken Simplification (capability.rs)
- Remove cached `claims` field from CapabilityToken struct
- Claims are now verified on-demand rather than stored unverified
- Eliminates security footgun of accessing unverified claims
- Simplifies deserialization by storing only raw COSE token

## Clippy Compliance (all modules)
- Replace `sort()` with `sort_unstable()` for non-stable ordering
- Fix numeric cast warnings with explicit `u8::try_from()`
- Use format string interpolation (`{var}` vs `{}`, var)
- Collapse single-line struct variants for readability

## Code Formatting (rustfmt)
- Consistent line wrapping for function arguments
- Improved struct/enum variant alignment
- Better readability for multi-line expressions

## Module-Specific Improvements

audit.rs:
- Safe u64→u8 conversion in test helpers
- Cleaner chain validation assertions

checkpoint.rs:
- Simplified ForkEvidence::new() call sites
- Cleaner CheckpointValidationError variants
- Better nonce derivation formatting

lease.rs:
- Collapsed single-field enum variants
- Improved Display impl formatting

operation.rs:
- Consistent test helper formatting
- Cleaner assertion messages

quorum.rs:
- Improved threshold calculation formatting

These changes improve code safety, maintainability, and compliance
with project linting standards.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
